action.title: Bug: Application crashes on startup
action.body:
## Description
The application crashes when starting up.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Run the application
2. Observe crash

## Expected behavior
Application should start normally.

action.body:
## Summary
This PR fixes the startup crash issue.

## Changes
- Fixed initialization order
- Added error handling

Closes #123
